# tfe_gcp_oidc_configuration

Generates a new TFE GCP OIDC Configuration.

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `project_number` (String) The GCP Project containing the workload provider and service account.
- `service_account_email` (String) The email of your GCP service account, with permissions to encrypt and decrypt using a Cloud KMS key.
- `workload_provider_name` (String) The fully qualified workload provider path.

### Optional

- `organization` (String) Name of the organization to which the TFE GCP OIDC configuration belongs.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of the GCP OIDC configuration.
